Women's Dresses

What are the different types of dresses?

At Express our collection of dresses includes maxi dresses, mini dresses, midi dresses, cocktail dresses, little black dresses, pink dresses, sweater dresses, shirt dresses, occasion dresses, denim dresses and more. 

Maxi Dresses

Our range of maxi dresses ensure you’ll be well dressed for almost any occasion. Long sleeve maxi dresses offer an elevated look while on-trend floral floor-length dresses are perfect for anything from spring weddings or summer weddings to casual gatherings with the girls. There are also monochromatic styles, halter dresses, off-the-shoulder looks and high cowl neck maxi dresses for everything in between. Long story short: your style’s totally covered here. 

Cocktail Dresses
Going out this weekend? Incredible. Let’s get you dressed for cocktail hour. Stop by the dress destination for printed mesh styles, wide leg jumpsuits and bow-clad rompers, ruched dresses, sheer lace strapless looks and ruffles. 

Denim Dresses

Love a Canadian tuxedo? So. Do. We. Give yourself the perfect head-to-toe all-jean look with a wide-leg denim jumpsuit, a perfect sweetheart corset style denim midi or a black denim long sleeve mini dress. 

How to choose the right dress for your body type?

What do you love most? Your arms? Your legs? Want to accentuate your waist? We have perfect styles for every body type. From mini dresses that’ll show off your legs to strapless styles that’ll make your arm muscles pop. At Express we have corset styles, full coverage looks, and sheer pieces that are so on-trend. Whatever confidence-boosting dress you need, we’ve got it ready. 

What are the different lengths of dresses?

At the Express Dress Destination we feature many lengths of dresses, from short mini dresses to floor-length maxi dresses. We also have mid-length midi styles. The best part is that each length has a variety of styles such as monochromatic looks, florals, belted dresses, dropped waist fits and more. See for yourself!

How to style dresses for different occasions?

The dresses at Express work with and for a variety of accessories, occasions, seasons, shoes and colors. How to style them depends on your own personal needs. Remember that confidence is the best accessory. Whatever you pair with your dress from belts to purses, shoes and jewelry, make sure it suits your own true-to-you vibe and you’ll be set.

  • © 2026 Express. All rights reserved.
Express and our third-party partners may use multiple types of cookies, pixels, and similar technologies that store and/or access information on your device to enhance site navigation, analyze your site usage, and assist in marketing efforts. We may also share information about your use of our site with our social media, advertising, and analytics partners who may combine it with other information that you’ve provided to them or that they’ve collected from your use of their services. By clicking “Accept All” you consent to our use of cookies, pixels, and similar technologies. To learn more, please refer to ourPrivacy Policy.

Privacy Preference Center

When you visit any website, it may store or retrieve information on your browser, mostly in the form of cookies. This information might be about you, your preferences or your device and is mostly used to make the site work as you expect it to. The information does not usually directly identify you, but it can give you a more personalized web experience. Because we respect your right to privacy, you can choose not to allow some types of cookies. Click on the different category headings to find out more and change our default settings. However, blocking some types of cookies may impact your experience of the site and the services we are able to offer.
More information

Manage Consent Preferences

Strictly Necessary Cookies

Always Active

These cookies are necessary for the website to function and cannot be switched off in our systems. They are usually only set in response to actions made by you which amount to a request for services, such as setting your privacy preferences, logging in or filling in forms.    You can set your browser to block or alert you about these cookies, but some parts of the site will not then work. These cookies do not store any personally identifiable information.

Performance Cookies

These cookies allow us to count visits and traffic sources so we can measure and improve the performance of our site. They help us to know which pages are the most and least popular and see how visitors move around the site.    All information these cookies collect is aggregated and therefore anonymous. If you do not allow these cookies we will not know when you have visited our site, and will not be able to monitor its performance.

Functional Cookies

These cookies enable the website to provide enhanced functionality and personalisation. They may be set by us or by third party providers whose services we have added to our pages.    If you do not allow these cookies then some or all of these services may not function properly.

Targeting Cookies

These cookies may be set through our site by our advertising partners. They may be used by those companies to build a profile of your interests and show you relevant adverts on other sites.    They do not store directly personal information, but are based on uniquely identifying your browser and internet device. If you do not allow these cookies, you will experience less targeted advertising.
